name: India Construction Tax — GST + TDS + Labour Cess
name_hi: भारत निर्माण कर — जीएसटी + टीडीएस + श्रम उपकर
standard: CGST/SGST/IGST Act + Income-Tax Act + BOCW Cess Act
regulator: Central Board of Indirect Taxes & Customs (CBIC) + Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) + Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Cess Act 1996
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check tender documents, invoices and payment certificates for combined Indian-construction tax compliance — GST (correct HSN/SAC, rate by contract type: 12% affordable housing / 18% commercial / 5% govt works contract), TDS u/s 194C (1% individual, 2% company) on contractor payments, labour cess 1% on construction cost (BOCW Act), reverse-charge, place-of-supply, composition-scheme consistency.
description_hi: निविदा, चालान एवं भुगतान प्रमाणपत्रों की भारतीय निर्माण कर अनुपालन (जीएसटी, टीडीएस 194C, श्रम उपकर 1%) हेतु जाँच।

rates.labour_cess_bocw: 1% of construction cost above ₹10 lakh threshold
